item.title: BREAKING: The alleged shooter of Charlie Kirk is Tyler Robinson, a 22-year-old from Utah. He comes from a very pro-gun conservative family and proudly wore a Trump costume for Halloween a few years ago.

item.title: So it's... a witch hunt then? I'm confused.
item.description: Let's all brainstorm on how the wingnuts are going to spin this. I'll start: "He was radicalized by Nancy Pelosi and George Soros via Bill Gates' microchips in the COVID19 vaccine he didn't get so, so they snuck the microchip into his InfoWars suppliments to shoot Charlie Kirk. Alex Jones is a Mossad agent now."

item.title: While I didn't write this, I absolutely could have!
item.description: I've had 2 (that I know of) experiences with transgender women in the public toilets, one being that when I brought my then 6 yr old son into the bathroom with me ( I won't let him use the men's alone) she looked panicked, like I'd be cross, but instead I just apologized for having my son in there and explained why, then complimented her nails... The other one was when the poor girl was stood outside the bathroom and looked worried to go in... I asked her if she wanted to go in ( otherwise I'd have been pushing past her to open the door) and she said yes but she wasn't sure who'd be in there, I just said "yeah I get that, that's why us girls like to go in together" and opened the door for her.... Women are women, and those women are whoever they tell you they are!!! No one needs to focus on fucking genitals at birth...
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Prayed they could blame immigrant or minority - Kirk
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: Nancy Mace Flips Out Over Lawmaker’s Observation that “Boob Jobs” Are Gender-Affirming Care ...
item.description: South Carolina Republican Nancy Mace called California Democrat Sara Jacobs “disgusting” in the U.S. House of Representatives on Wednesday, after Jacobs said medical procedures like “boob jobs” for cisgender people are forms of gender-affirming care. “I would just like to point out that it’s interesting my colleague from South Carolina is so obsessed with the issue of trans people, using horrible slurs to talk about them, when many people in this body have received gender-affirming care,” Jacobs said, per The Hill. “Filler is gender-affirming care. Boob jobs [are] gender-affirming care. Botox is gender-affirming care. Lots of my colleagues have received gender-affirming care, and let me be clear, everybody should have access to the gender-affirming care they need, and I think that we should respect everybody in this country.” Immediately afterward, Mace — long rumored to have received cosmetic surgery — began yelling at Jacobs from her seat, though she was not recognized to speak by Speaker of the House Mike Johnson. “Ridiculous. You are absolutely ridiculous. What the hell is your problem?” Mace shouted, calling Jacobs “disgusting” and “an insult.” Mace continued her offensive on Elon Musk’s X platform, denouncing Jacobs’ comments about “my body” and implying her cosmetic surgery was related to being a sexual assault survivor. “PS - I have a good surgeon if you ever want to get your nose done,” Mace added. Jacobs is Jewish. https://www.them.us/story/nancy-mace-anti-trans-boob-jobs-gender-affirming
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: It's time for Funny Friday! A humorous dump to end the week with some laughs
item.description:
Brother's whole world is about to change. As always, there'll be a link in the comments to a private folder with some bonus content with more adult humor that you might not want to open at work. Make sure to check it out when you can. Now on with the show!
You fool! With their numbers if they get access to our knowledge we'll have no chance at all!
Handy for every year you forget dad's birthday or a relative's anniversary.
It's the Battle Royal we all want to see!
Beneath every great woman is a strong man?
The only thing worse than the natural kind... (Just kidding, Swedes are cool)
It only looks effortless.
Nobody can ever roast you harder than family.
So did you notice the odd one out the first time, or did you need to go back?
100% accurate.
Picard knows The Way.
You never know, it could have been from Monty Python.
I'm probably going to hell if I post many more dad jokes like this... but it'll be worth it!
What's taters, precious?
Should I grow some man boobs and try this out?
... so, is Zelda super strong, or do I need to lose some weight to get pushed into a wall like this?
Gotta try to include at least one Classical Mythology reference in these dumps, keep it classy.
Unless the wife is okay with it. In which case be prepared for him to laugh in your face.
Hopefully the car was okay with that treatment...
Being colorblind at Pride must be a confusing experience.
Women love this one weird trick?
Make sure to season that bear with some tears.
That's... that's not wrong...
Be the reason why your monsters need therapy.
Ah shit, not again.
There's nothing like an author taking pride in his work.
What fun is love if you can't send each other cursed images?
*1000 yard stare*
Satan is waiting for me.
Must be a dad. If there's one thing I can count on, it's the dads I've known trying to prove something is possible after their kids say it's not.
Damn, it is getting goth in here!
You fell victim to one of the classic blunders!
That last bit is genius, no notes.
We should all be thankful.
Is that orange cat named Wormtongue or something? Also, I don't have a cat, so this is the closest thing you get to a cat tax. Hope you had some laughs and it's a great start to your weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: It was one of them after all
item.description: Fp edit find more at https://linktr.ee/GridSquares Hey folks, if you already saw the longer form version of this video I appreciate it. It did come out that information at the start of it was not accurate. I will be honest I did Rush that video, but have removed it due to the inaccuracies. I appreciate you watching and commenting down below https://youtube.com/shorts/uesIAuOs6Xo?feature=share
item.dc:creator: SquaresNews
